world.title: Cancer survivor Trey Mancini completes MLB comeback with 3 hits in start for Angels
world.description: Los Angeles Angels first baseman Trey Mancini, a cancer survivor and former Baltimore slugger, had three hits in his first major league game since 2023 on Monday night in a 5-4 loss to the visiting Houston Astros in 10 innings.
